case_title: EBER E GODOY VS. GURNANI, INC., DBA TACO BELL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GODOY, EBER E AS TO DEFENDANT GURNANI, INC., DBA TACO BELL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
